date: 2026-07-10

# Friday, July 10

- [ ] #task Daily note task [scheduled:: 2026-07-10]

```tasks
( status.type is TODO ) OR ( status.type is IN_PROGRESS )
is not blocked
filter by function task.file.path !== query.file.path
filter by function !task.scheduled.moment || task.scheduled.moment.isSameOrBefore(moment(query.file.filenameWithoutExtension, "YYYYMMDD"), "day")
filter by function !task.tags.includes("#hide")
group by path
limit groups to 3 tasks
sort by function task.file.path
sort by function task.lineNumber
short mode
hide toolbar
```
